name: pdf-list-lambda
description: List PDFs Lambda for PDF Directory

scripts.build: tsc && mv dist/list-pdfs/* dist/ && mv dist/shared dist/shared-tmp && rm -rf dist/list-pdfs && mv dist/shared-tmp dist/shared && sed -i '' 's|../shared/|./shared/|g' dist/index.js
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && cp ../package.json . && npm install --production && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd ..
